title: Wireless Design, Configuration, and Validation · Packet Lens: Net Wireless Topologies
summary: Design staff, guest, and point-to-point wireless service across crowded, regulated, and mobile spaces. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net wireless topologies increment in a secure wireless survey and deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose infrastructure, mesh, ad hoc, and point-to-point wireless topology from backhaul, mobility, scale, and failure needs.
Distinguish SSID, BSSID, ESS, hidden names, and client discovery without treating an SSID as a security control.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
